en-US.name: IR Custom AIOS
en-US.summary: Your AI assistant for business operations.
en-US.description: IR Custom AIOS is your AI assistant that can help you manage your business operations through voice commands.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask IR Custom AIOS what's my email
Alexa, ask IR Custom AIOS for my daily briefing
Alexa, ask IR Custom AIOS about my business

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'Alexa, ask IR Custom AIOS' followed by your question.
